skills.name: Last Rites
skills.description: Cast a buff that decreases damage received when the caster receives damage while attacking
skills.effect_text:
Decreases damage by CaptionRatio %
Duration: CaptionTime minutes

skills.name: Deploy Cappella
skills.description: Deploy a temporary sacellum with a wrapped cloak. Increases the damage of allies near the cappella.
skills.effect_text:
Cappella Duration: 15 seconds
Increases Damage by CaptionRatio2 %

skills.name: Aspergillum
skills.description: Fill your equipped weapon with holy water and make it splash with every attack.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Duration: CaptionTime minutes

skills.name: Binatio
skills.description: Applies effect that enhances your basic attack temporarily. During Binatio buff, the basic attack is changed to 2 slow consecutive hits, and the attack factor increases.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 2
Duration CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Paraclitus Time
skills.description: Become resistant to knockback and knockdown through prayer. Enemy's movement speed is reduced for 5 seconds when attacking enemy during the buff duration.
skills.effect_text:
Movement Speed: - CaptionRatio %
Buff Duration: + CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Visible Talent
skills.effect_text:
Duration Damage is Accumulated: 5 seconds
Strikes with 4% of accumulated damage per stack (25 stacks in total)

attributes.name: Aspergillum: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Aspergillum] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Last Rites: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the decrease in damage received effect of [Last Rites] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Binatio: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases skill factor of [Binatio] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Deploy Cappella: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Deploy Cappella]'s Holy property damage increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Magical Stat: Chaplain
attributes.description:
* Chaplain's stat growth ratio is changed.

* STR ↔ INT, DEX ↔ SPR

* Skill property of Binatio, Aspergillum is changed to magic

attributes.name: [Arts] Visible Talent: In Goddess' Name
attributes.description: * The [Visible Talent] buff no longer accumulates damage. It now causes you to ignore the enemy's block and evasion when attacking, and deal additional damage in proportion to their block and evasion.

attributes.name: [Arts] Aspergillum: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Aspergillum] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Aspergillum: Magnus Exorcismus
attributes.description:
* Removes additional Strike effect from [Aspergillum] buff

* Summon Magnus Exorcismus magic circle which damages the targeted ground by [Aspergillum] factor

* Magnus Exorcismus magic circle lasts for 15 seconds

attributes.name: [Arts] Binatio: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Binatio] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Chaplain: Additional Damage
attributes.description:
* Additional damage increases by [ATK x 10% per attribute level]

* The higher value between Physical ATK or Magic ATK is applied as ATK
